steps.t: Reinn is in the Twenty-first Hall. You should speak with Reinn.
The summoning horn can be found in the Twenty-first Hall, next to Mögr. You should use the horn to call Reinn to your side when you are ready to depar…
The Great Hall of Durin is south of the Twenty-first Hall, found by taking a right from the southern arch. Mögr has asked you to explore the hall sout…
The Great Hall of Durin is south of the Twenty-first Hall in Zelem-melek. You should explore the Great Hall of Durin in Zelem-melek with Reinn, headin…
You spotted the light of a camp-fire on the lower levels of the Great Hall of Durin. You should find the camp-fire and the one who tends it.
